subtopics.title: Greetings and Introductions
common_misconceptions: French is too hard for beginners
You need to be in France to learn French
subtopics.teaching_note: Pronunciation guide: Bonjour [bɔ̃ʒuʁ] = hello/good day. Salut [saly] = hi/bye (informal). Bonsoir [bɔ̃swaʁ] = good evening. Comment t'appelles-tu? [kɔmɑ̃ t‿apɛl ty] = What is your name? Je m'appelle... [ʒə mapɛl] = My name is... Comment ça va? [kɔmɑ̃ sa va] = How are you? Ça va bien [sa va bjɛ̃] = I'm fine. Nigerian context: French is Nigeria's second official language. Neighboring Francophone countries: Benin, Niger, Cameroon, Chad. ECOWAS uses French and English.
